title: Young Girl Blue Hair Distressed Expression Stands
sourceTitle: Young Girl Blue Hair Distressed Expression Stands
prompt: A young girl with blue hair and a distressed expression stands in front of a giant, fluorescent pink stitched monster with fluorescent yellow eyes and a wide, toothy grin. The monster's mouth is fluorescent green, revealing large, blocky teeth. The girl wears a brightly colored, polka dot-patterned t-shirt in fluorescent pink, green, and yellow and has fluorescent pink and green pigtails. The overall style is reminiscent of a comic book or graphic novel, with bold outlines and vibrant, contrasting fluorescent pink, green, and yellow colors dominating the scene. The background is a solid fluorescent yellow-green color.
